title: 「Something / Anything / Everything + Adjective」句型
titleEn: Describing indefinite pronouns with following adjectives

source.file: Sentence Structure 49 - 「Something _ Anything _ Everything + Adjective 句」.pdf

formula: Something / Anything / Everything + adjective + other information
example: I want to eat something sweet after dinner.
exampleZh: 我晚餐後想吃點甜的東西。

examples.en: I want to eat something sweet after dinner.
examples.zh: 我晚餐後想吃點甜的東西。

meaning.zh: 把形容詞放在 something、anything 或 everything 後面，便可描述未有明確名稱的事物、任何符合條件的事物或所有相關事物。

rules.en: Put the adjective after the pronoun.
rules.zh: 形容詞必須放在 something、anything 或 everything 後面。

rules.en: Something usually means an unspecified thing.
rules.zh: Something 常見於肯定句，也可用於提出或索取某項東西。

rules.en: Anything is common in questions, negatives and conditions.
rules.zh: Anything 常見於疑問句、否定句和條件句，亦可表示任何一樣都可以。

rules.en: Treat all three pronouns as singular.
rules.zh: Something、anything 和 everything 均視為單數。

rules.en: Do not add a or an after the pronoun.
rules.zh: 代名詞後不要加入 a 或 an。

rules.en: Use anything rather than something in ordinary negatives.
examples: I did not see anything unusual.

benefits.en: It describes a thing without naming it exactly.
benefits.zh: 不知道事物名稱或名稱不重要時，可直接描述其特點。

benefits.en: It makes a long description shorter.
benefits.zh: 它可把「名詞＋形容詞子句」縮短，使句子更直接。

benefits.en: It forms natural questions and negative sentences.
benefits.zh: Anything＋形容詞能讓疑問句和否定句更自然。

benefits.en: It clearly shows the intended range.
benefits.zh: Something、anything 和 everything 能準確表達某件、任何或全部事物。
它可避免反覆使用 thing、item、information 等一般名詞。

en: Rewrite each sentence using something + adjective, anything + adjective, or everything + adjective.
Choose the form that best preserves the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 something＋形容詞、anything＋形容詞或 everything＋形容詞改寫以下句子。
選擇最能保留原句意思的形式。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I want a sweet snack after dinner.
questions.promptZh: 我晚餐後想吃一份甜點。
questions.answer: I want something sweet to eat after dinner.
questions.answerZh: 我晚餐後想吃點甜的東西。
questions.highlight: I want something sweet to eat after dinner.

questions.prompt: Mia heard a noise outside the window. It sounded strange.
questions.promptZh: 米婭聽到窗外有聲音。那聲音聽起來很奇怪。

questions.answerZh: 米婭聽到窗外有些奇怪的聲音。
questions.highlight: Mia heard something strange outside the window.
